queries.question: List all the projects, and the required supplies
queries.sql: SELECT project_name, name FROM Supplies JOIN Projects ON Supplies.id = Projects.Supplies_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?name WHERE {
  ?supplies a :Supplies .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects p:hasSupplies ?supplies .
  ?projects p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?supplies p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: What textbooks are available for optical spectroscopy?
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM Textbooks JOIN Projects ON Textbooks.id = Projects.textbook_id WHERE Projects.project_name = 'Optical Spectroscopy'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects p:hasTextbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbooks p:title ?title .
  ?projects p:project_name ?project_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?project_name_f) = "Optical Spectroscopy")
}

queries.question: What textbooks and supplies are available for optical spectroscopy?
queries.sql: SELECT title, name FROM Textbooks JOIN Projects ON Textbooks.id = Projects.textbook_id JOIN Supplies ON Supplies.id = Projects.Supplies_id WHERE Projects.project_name = 'Optical Spectroscopy'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects p:hasTextbooks ?textbooks .
  ?supplies a :Supplies .
  ?projects p:hasSupplies ?supplies .
  ?textbooks p:title ?title .
  ?supplies p:name ?name .
  ?projects p:project_name ?project_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?project_name_f) = "Optical Spectroscopy")
}

queries.question: List all the projects, and the required textbooks and other supplies
queries.sql: SELECT project_name, title, name FROM Textbooks JOIN Projects ON Textbooks.id = Projects.textbook_id JOIN Supplies ON Supplies.id = Projects.Supplies_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects p:hasTextbooks ?textbooks .
  ?supplies a :Supplies .
  ?projects p:hasSupplies ?supplies .
  ?projects p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?textbooks p:title ?title .
  ?supplies p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Give me a list of projects and related resources.
queries.sql: SELECT project_name, title FROM Textbooks JOIN Projects ON Textbooks.id = Projects.textbook_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?title WHERE {
  ?textbooks a :Textbooks .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?projects p:hasTextbooks ?textbooks .
  ?projects p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?textbooks p:title ?title .
}
